title: Original Data Asset Engine — Zero-Budget Backlink Replacement
goal: Generate original, citeable finance micro-reports from QFINHUB calculators that earn passive citations

weekly_data_assets.title: Debt Snowball vs Avalanche Payoff Comparison
Rent vs Buy Break-Even Scenarios by City
Compound Interest Growth by Monthly Contribution
Retirement Gap by Age and Savings Rate
Emergency Fund Targets by Household Expense Level

must_include: methodology section explaining how numbers were derived
chart or simple visualization if possible
journalist summary (2-3 sentences for quick citation)

publish_rules.publish_only_if: useful, original, clear methodology, no unsupported advice, connects to money page
publish_rules.frequency: one data asset per week minimum
publish_rules.format: blog post with data + standalone data page
